risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat generation from harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling system or improve heat sink design.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features at cable entry points.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under peak torque.
risk.mit: Conduct FEA analysis to validate structural integrity.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Include clear assembly instructions and alignment aids.

risk.desc: Risk of corrosion in exposed fasteners.
risk.mit: Use corrosion-resistant fasteners or apply protective coating.

Tool flange can be designed to allow for easy attachment of end-effector
Base plate can be designed to provide a mounting surface for servos and sensors

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
physics_paths: power_channel: motor power lines run from motor controller to motor
signal_channel: sensor/encoder signal lines run from motor controller to control board
thermal_inspection_window: allows visual inspection of internal components for thermal health
ground_point: provides a common ground point for all electronics modules
service_cover: provides access for maintenance and service
connector_keying: ensures correct mating of connectors
integration_opportunities: driver_bay_shell: can integrate with motor controller housing for improved thermal management
signal_channel: can be routed through chassis for additional protection
thermal_inspection_window: can be integrated with service cover for easy access

manufacturing_strategy.datum: primary datum feature (flat, bore, or pin)
manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

verification_focus: power_signal_separation: ensure motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines are separated
return_path_and_grounding_intent: ensure grounding scheme is implemented
board_mounting_and_clearance: ensure PCBs are mounted with proper clearance
p0_feature_mapping: ensure all P0 internal features are mapped to part_tree and geometry_ops
coordinate_distribution: ensure geometry_ops are distributed across the subsystem volume
per_child_geometry_density: ensure each part_tree child has 4+ dedicated geometry_ops
primary_datum_evidence: ensure a primary datum feature is explicitly named and placed
interface_fit_class: ensure adjacent interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm
assembly_sequence_defined: ensure ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step
expected_op_variety: ensure use of seed-characteristic ops
dimensional_realism: ensure dimensions match robot_arm scale
